ip_outcome_note: Card name is 'Masked Saiyan' — the canonical identity name for Bardock under Towa's brainwashing in Dragon Ball Heroes and Xenoverse. The ornate white face mask with pink/magenta markings is the Masked Saiyan's definitive and unique visual identifier. Dragon Ball Wiki and Xenoverse 2 Wiki confirm: the Masked Saiyan is Bardock, brainwashed by Towa using a Demon Realm mask that supplies dark ki. The mask is Bardock-specific — no other Dragon Ball character wears this design. Card name plus mask visual confirm identity as Bardock (Masked Saiyan form).

trivia_bullets.text: The Masked Saiyan is Bardock — Goku's father — pulled from the moment just before his death at Frieza's Supernova and brainwashed by Towa using a Demon Realm mask that provides a steady supply of Dark Ki. His identity as Bardock is the central mystery of the Masked Saiyan Saga in Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 and Dragon Ball Heroes. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Masked Saiyan Saga, via WebSearch; Xenoverse 2 Wiki: Masked Saiyan, via WebSearch]
sources: Dragon Ball Wiki: Masked Saiyan Saga, via WebSearch
Xenoverse 2 Wiki: Masked Saiyan, via WebSearch

trivia_bullets.text: The Masked Saiyan concept originated in Dragon Ball Online (the 2010 Korean MMORPG) before being adapted into Dragon Ball Heroes and Xenoverse 2. His white mask with pink markings is a Demon Realm technology design by Towa — the mask's destruction is what frees Bardock from her control, purging the Dark Ki and restoring his identity. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Masked Saiyan Saga, via WebSearch]
sources: Dragon Ball Wiki: Masked Saiyan Saga, via WebSearch

trivia_bullets.text: SD3-04 is part of the Dark Invasion starter deck (DBS-SD03). The SD3 release came with a promo card 'Increasing Evil Masked Saiyan' described as 'incredibly powerful,' suggesting the Masked Saiyan is intended as the deck's flagship threat card rather than a utility piece. [WebSearch: DBS Series 3 roundup, SD3 promo mentioned]
sources: WebSearch: DBS Series 3 roundup strategy page

related_cards.name: Towa, Space Time Unleashed
related_cards.note: Towa is Masked Saiyan Bardock's captor — the architect of his brainwashing

related_cards.name: Power Aura Mira
related_cards.note: Mira and Towa operate the Time Breaker dark empire together; Masked Saiyan is their weapon

related_cards.name: Quick blade Trunks
related_cards.note: Trunks and the Future Warrior hunt the Masked Saiyan to free him and locate Towa/Mira

related_cards.name: Dark Plot
related_cards.note: The conspiracy Masked Saiyan enforces as an enslaved weapon
